a11y: Su mobile: toggle hamburger con aria-expanded/aria-controls
style: it-navbar{display:block} it-navbar .agid-navbar{background:var(--it-color-primary)} it-navbar .agid-navbar-inner{max-width:1040px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap} it-navbar .agid-navbar-toggle{display:none;background:transparent;border:0;color:#fff;font-size:1.5rem;line-height:1;cursor:pointer;padding:.6rem .4rem} it-navbar .agid-navbar-toggle:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--it-color-focus)} it-navbar .agid-navbar-list{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.25rem;margin:0;padding:0} it-navbar .agid-navbar-link{display:inline-block;padding:.9em 1em;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;border-bottom:3px solid transparent} it-navbar .agid-navbar-link.is-active{border-bottom-color:#fff;font-weight:700} @media (max-width:768px){it-navbar .agid-navbar-toggle{display:block} it-navbar .agid-navbar-list{display:none;flex-direction:column;width:100%} it-navbar .agid-navbar-list.is-open{display:flex} it-navbar .agid-navbar-link{width:100%}} it-navbar .agid-navbar-lang{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.25rem;color:#fff;white-space:nowrap} it-navbar .agid-lang-btn{background:transparent;border:1px solid #ffffff66;color:#fff;border-radius:4px;padding:.1em .5em;cursor:pointer;font:inherit;font-size:.85rem} it-navbar .agid-lang-btn[aria-pressed=true]{background:#fff;color:var(--it-color-primary)}
